info.name: World of Shadows - Complete Backend + World Engine Suite
info.description: Comprehensive Postman test suite for the current backend and world-engine state. Covers auth, admin, moderator content, forum flows, game bridge, direct runtime HTTP, and optional high-risk endpoints.
